QueryVariableConfigurationSpecifications.action: The operation to perform on the instance; current valid value: resizeList
QueryVariableConfigurationSpecifications.spec: Instance specification. Exactly one of instance specification, specification family ID, or instance ID must be provided.
QueryVariableConfigurationSpecifications.specId: Specification family ID. Exactly one of instance specification, specification family ID, or instance ID must be provided.
QueryVariableConfigurationSpecifications.zone: Specifies the zone information. The naming convention is "country-region-availability-zone-index" in lowercase; for example, Beijing Zone A is "cn-bj-a". Required when spec or specId is provided.
QueryVariableConfigurationSpecifications.instanceIdList: List of instance IDs. Exactly one of instance specification, specification family ID, or instance ID must be provided.
